item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: A hub within a hub. Hm, I'll bite.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I cannot properly express my feelings of anticipation for this.

Best of luck, Kal. Let's see how it pans out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
hooooooooolllyyyyyyyy shiiiiiiiit

More Coldest War stuff is good. More Kalinin stuff is good.

I'm really excited to see how this story arc pans out.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
This is an experiment in a longer format of story for the site. Over the next month, I will be releasing regular installments of this narrative. As someone who has committed the crime of leaving indefinite cliffhangers to an extended story arc, I would like to present something with a scheduled end. If this succeeds, I have plans in the works for further arcs in this storyline.

Before I go any further, some credits. The original artwork for the hub site is by Will Nunes, whose outstanding work may be viewed at his gallery here. I encourage everyone to go check it out. Additionally, the telegram image is the work of the esteemed djkaktus, whose body of work, for the few people unfamiliar, may be viewed here.

This is, of course, an entry in The Coldest War canon. This story is set after the events of The Woodvale Incident, so reading that will provide additional context. I also encourage you to check out the other fine articles on that canon page.

Na zdorovje.
